name: Episode 1
overview: Drunk and broken-hearted, Byun Hyuk gets into a scandalous accident on a plane. Baek Joon is accused of stealing while on duty at a luxury hotel.

name: Episode 2
overview: When the footage of the plane incident goes public, Hyuk is in the hot seat. He tries to make things right, only to have his father squash his efforts.

name: Episode 3
overview: While police search for Hyuk, Joon steps in to smuggle him out to safety. She gets him a job, but the rich boy can't seem to stay out of trouble.

name: Episode 4
overview: Hyuk turns himself in to the police, unaware of the work he's undoing. Upon release, he's kicked out of the house stripped of clothes and resources.

name: Episode 5
overview: Hyuk follows Joon on her way to work one morning and ends up joining her cleaning crew. Their first assignment takes them to Gangsu Group's headquarters.

name: Episode 6
overview: Joon overhears a conversation that may shatter Hyuk's trust in his brother. Kwon Je-hoon is entrusted to organize a product launching event.

name: Episode 7
overview: Upon his father's request, Hyuk considers applying for an internship at Gangsu. Threatened by the idea, Byun Woo-sung tries to talk him out of it.

name: Episode 8
overview: Mr. Jang moves Hyuk to find a win-win solution to end Gangsu's exploitation of small factories. Meanwhile, Je-hoon steps in to nip the case in the bud.

name: Episode 9
overview: Despite near-impossible hurdles, Hyuk and Joon's rice bowls find success in a niche market. But those with the bigger slice don't want to share.

name: Episode 10
overview: A shocking revelation concerning Joon's father causes her to fall off the radar. Hyuk finally sees the lengths his brother is willing to go to win.

name: Episode 11
overview: Kim Gi-seop has a rough first few days in the office, but Joon's crew steps in to back him up. Hyuk attends a series of boozy offsite meetings.

name: Episode 12
overview: Facing accusations from his brother, Hyuk has three days to prove his innocence. To get a hold of hard evidence, Joon recruits an unlikely spy.

name: Episode 13
overview: Joon quits her job to find what she wants to do. Hyuk looks into a company named BS. Woo-sung suspects that Je-hoon has turned.

name: Episode 14
overview: Je-hoon plans a day full of activities from Joon's bucket list. What she doesn't know is that this is his way of saying goodbye.

name: Episode 15
overview: Gangsu Group retaliates against corruption charges by firing their employees. But the groundwork's already been laid for a "byeonhyeok": a revolution.

name: Episode 16
overview: The police seize Hyuk, Joon, and Je-hoon, along with papers implicating Chairman Byun Gang-soo. The company undergoes radical changes under new leadership.
